title: Severe anaphylactic reaction after blue dye injection for sentinel lymph node biopsy in breast surgery: Report of two cases and literature review.
author_string: Frountzas, Maximos, Theodoropoulos, Charalampos, Karathanasis, Panagiotis, Nikolaou, Christina, Zografos, Constantinos G et al.
abstract: Anaphylactic reactions, and especially the severe ones (types III and IV), should be kept in mind as considerable adverse effects while using blue dyes for SLNB.
